title: bauhinia moningerae
intro: Bauhinia moningerae, also known as the Philippine orchid tree or Bauhinia tree, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Bauhinia moningerae include treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as having antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. Bauhinia moningerae is often prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, which can be used to treat various health ailments, and it is also used in traditional medicine in some parts of Asia.
